name: reload
_note: root.reload fetches a single saved computation by id from the caller's per-user notebook so the lens can re-hydrate the playground. With a live owner actor + STATE, an unknown id (the realistic isolated-call reality — the assassin drives each macro independently with no prior save in the same notebook) fails-CLOSED with ok:false 'computation not found', never a throw or no_db. A matching id returns the immutable saved computation.
